title: RPC Request
description: JSON-RPC 2.0 request with optional v2.1 extensions. In transport usage this logical object must be carried inside a PayloadFrame after agent:capabilities negotiation completes.

outbound_compression.description: Optional override for agent->hub PayloadFrame compression policy for this request (and matching rpc:chunk/rpc:complete). When omitted, the agent uses its configured default. Negotiated session limits still apply, so a none-only session keeps cmp=none even if gzip is requested.
